query: SELECT id, code, name, value, unit, category FROM pricingConfig WHERE code IN ('MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML', 'MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML', 'COCINA_ML_L', 'COCINA_ML_U', 'COCINA_ML_LINEAL') ORDER BY code;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT id, code, name, value, unit, category FROM pricingConfig WHERE code IN ('MUEBLE_INFERIOR_ML', 'MUEBLE_SUPERIOR_ML', 'COCINA_ML_L', 'COCINA_ML_U', 'COCINA_ML_LINEAL') ORDER BY code;
